assessment.focus_note: Continue to monitor geopolitical narratives, especially the Strait of Hormuz situation and the use of disinformation. Connect geopolitical shifts to economic stability and national sovereignty, focusing on how economic nationalism impacts global markets. Expose disinformation campaigns, particularly those misrepresenting factual events for strategic narrative construction, and those distorting economic realities for political gain. Further explore the tension between global economic stability and national sovereignty, as highlighted by geoeconomic confrontation and fragmentation.
